prestazioni: Installation of a **Novitec N-Tronic 296 GTB Stage 2 ECU/TCU remap** for the **F163F 3.0L V6 twin-turbo + electric motor (654 hp stock)** hybrid powertrain, optimizing the **1.5-bar boost pressure** (up from 1.2 bar) and recalibrating the **MGU-K electric motor torque delivery** for a **target of 850 hp (780 hp ICE + 70 hp electric)** with a **0-60 mph time of 2.5s** (down from 2.9s). Includes **custom carbon-fiber air intake with K&N high-flow filters** to reduce intake restriction by 30%.

Replacement of the **stock IHI turbochargers** with **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine)** paired with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipes** (ceramic-coated) to eliminate turbo lag and support **900+ hp potential**. Upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)** and **Pankl H-beam connecting rods** to handle the increased cylinder pressure.

Fitted **Brembo GT 380mm carbon-ceramic brake discs (up from 398mm stock)** with **6-piston monobloc calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500 high-temperature pads** for improved fade resistance. Suspension overhaul includes **Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping** (compression, rebound, and roll stiffness) and **Eibach ERS race springs (20% stiffer than stock)** for track-focused handling. **AP Racing CP8460 hydraulic clutch kit** replaces the stock unit for improved pedal feel under high torque.
estetica: Full **Novitec N-Largo widebody kit** (carbon-fiber) extending the rear fenders by **60mm** and front by **40mm** to accommodate **20x11 ET40 front and 21x13 ET45 rear wheels** wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear)**. Kit includes **custom 3D-printed carbon-fiber side skirts** with integrated **LED turn signals** and a **rear diffuser with active Gurney flap** (electronically adjustable via the infotainment system).

Replacement of the **stock rear wing** with a **9H Carbon Fiber GT3-spec dual-element rear wing** (1,200mm span) featuring **adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees)** and **DRS-style active flap** for drag reduction on straights. **Front splitter upgraded to a 9H Carbon Fiber GT3-spec unit** with **integrated canards** and **removable dive planes** for high-speed stability. **Full PPF (Paint Protection Film) in XPEL Stealth** applied to the entire body to prevent rock chips.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position carbon-fiber bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified)** wrapped in **Alcantara with red contrast stitching** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter)** with **integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display** replaces the stock wheel. **Custom titanium roll cage (FIA-spec)** by **Sparco** with **removable door bars** for track use. **LED ambient lighting** with **16 million color options** controlled via the **Ferrari infotainment system**.
